reviews.comment:
Malísimo el shop: La atención de la cajera de la mañana es espantosa. No pueden cobrar con tarjeta de crédito ni débito. Un olor a cigarrillo en el lugar.
El shop es un asco. Deja mucho que desear.

(Translated by Google)
The shop is terrible: The cashier's service in the morning is awful. They don't accept credit or debit cards. There's a strong smell of cigarettes throughout the place.
The shop is disgusting. It leaves much to be desired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1X2VHQjRnRRAB
